build.description: Default build agent for coding tasks

docs.description: Documentation specialist. Use for README, docs, and changelogs.

plan.description: Planning agent for architecture and design

plan-arai.description: Modo de Planificación de arai, edita solo plans/

reviewer.description: Code review specialist. Use for PR reviews and quality checks.

tester.description: Testing specialist. Use for writing and running tests.

new-harness.description: Generador interactivo de harnesses de opencode

permission-creator.description: Genera configuraciones de permisos con diferentes niveles de estrictitud

instructions-creator.description: Genera AGENTS.md personalizado según el tipo y lenguaje del proyecto

mcp-creator.description: Genera configuraciones de servidores MCP locales o remotos

architecture-creator.description: Genera documentación de arquitectura de software

flow-creator.description: Genera flujos de trabajo y pipelines de automatización

plugin-creator.description: Genera plugins de TUI para opencode

rule-creator.description: Genera reglas de código y estándares de codificación

reference-creator.description: Genera referencias a repositorios y documentación externa

agent-creator.description: Genera definiciones de agentes opencode (primarios y subagentes)

skill-creator.description: Crea skills SKILL.md reutilizables con frontmatter YAML válido

script-creator.description: Crea scripts reutilizables en JavaScript, Python o Bash

commit.template: Stage all changes and create a conventional commit with an appropriate type and scope based on the changes.

deploy.template: Deploy the current project. Check the project type and deployment config, then execute the appropriate deploy command.

test.description: Run test suite for current project
test.template: Run the test suite for this project. First detect the test framework, then run all tests and report results.

email.description: Send an email using project SMTP configuration.
email.template: Understand the email requirements from the user. Build a JSON payload with 'to', 'subject', 'body', and optionally 'cc', 'bcc', 'html', 'attachments'. Write it to .opencode/email-payload.json. Then run: node shared/skills/email/scripts/send-email.js --payload .opencode/email-payload.json. Report success or error.

plan.description: Generate a detailed requirements plan in plans/ with TDD philosophy
plan.template: Create a detailed implementation plan for: $ARGUMENTS. Follow the TDD process: understand the request, research the codebase, create a plan document in plans/<auto-number>-<feature-slug>-<YYYY-MM-DD>.md with objective, requirements, architecture decisions, file changes, TDD flow, and verification steps. The auto-number is the next sequential number in plans/, and the date is today's date. Write failing tests first, then implement, then verify.

getrepo.description: Add a GitHub repository to repos.json and clone it to repos/
getrepo.template: Add a reference repository by URL. Parse the repository URL from: $ARGUMENTS. Run node .opencode/scripts/getrepo.js <url> to add it to repos.json and clone it. Report the result: which entry was added, where it was cloned. Supports formats: https://github.com/org/repo, org/repo. Use --description "text" to add a description.

updaterepos.description: Pull latest changes for all reference repositories in repos/
updaterepos.template: Update all cloned reference repositories. Run node .opencode/scripts/updaterepos.js to pull latest changes. Report the results: how many updated, up to date, or failed. To update a specific repo: node .opencode/scripts/updaterepos.js org/repo

shared-prompts.description: Reusable prompt fragments for common patterns

shared-rules.description: Coding standards, architecture, and documentation rules
